open_deferrals.why: AC1/AC2 (sworn init consent and --non-interactive default) are owned by T3/S09 which holds cmd/sworn/init.go. S26 ships ShowConsent() as a callable function; the init-flow wiring is a cross-track dependency.

violations: 1 (Gate 2): sworn binary committed in 2da8599 — not in planned touchpoints, explicitly removed in 3f496d1 which is in branch history; proof.md Files changed omits it. Fix: git rm --cached sworn && commit.

2 (Gate 3): TestIsEnabled_Neither absent — neither-sentinels path (IsEnabled() returns false when no files exist) is not unit-tested. journal Flag (a) renamed it to TestIsEnabled_OptedIn_NoOverrides but that test covers a different case (case 3, not case 4).
3 (Gate 6): AC8 says 'within 10ms'; TestFireNonBlocking uses 100ms threshold. proof.md claims AC8 delivered at 100ms without listing this divergence in Divergence from plan.
